reviews.review_description:
Why you developers doing this to us smh

Whats the reason for low effortes, low poly, low passion games like this...is it a skill issue or a money issue?

Or do you make the games cheap as possible in order to fund a real project in the future?
This game is good, although the graphics are kind of butt cheeks but other than that, this game is good

reviews.review_title: Needs lil more but kinda fun
reviews.review_description: It’s coming along and fun to try. Keep up the good work
I tried for 20 minutes and couldn't get the app to work. It also does not let me exit out of the game.  I have to shut off my headset to get out.

developer_response.body:
Hi mnchi,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience. We're very sorry to hear about the frustration you encountered, and we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

Our team is currently investigating the issue you described regarding the app not functioning properly and the difficulty exiting the game. These are certainly not the experiences we want our players to have.

We’re committed to resolving these problems as quickly as possible. In the meantime, if you have any additional details about the issue (e.g., your device or headset model), it would help us tremendously in pinpointing the cause. Please feel free to reach out to us at wase2716@gmail.com

Once we've addressed these concerns, we hope you’ll consider giving the game another try. If the improvements meet your expectations, we’d be grateful if you might reconsider your review.

reviews.review_description: Wish the game had more and I’m not too sure what the use of the coins are but the game is still really fun especially since it’s free

I am glad to be the first one reviewing this game. 
I was very pleased with the gameplay and ease of use and replayability. Also, if you'd like, when you crash you may step outside the vehicle and run down the road like Ricky Bobby. Very Immersive experience. Best free game yet.
